sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79652" key="parkate/lekto" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρ-κατέλεκτο</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρ-κλίνω</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρ-κύπτω</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρ-λαμβάνω</orth>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παρα-</foreign>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρμέμβλωκε</orth>, <sense id="n79652.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">παραβλώσκω</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
